BladeStorm, Katana of Steel Sleet  
 

Lore Item No Trade Placeable
Slot: PRIMARY
Skill: 2H Slashing Atk Delay: 45
DMG: 30 Dmg Bonus: 155
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
Effect: Rain of Swords (Combat, Casting Time: Instant) at Level 40
WT: 2.0 Size: MEDIUM
Class: WAR
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)
BladeStorm, Katana of Steel Sleet
Lore Item No Trade Placeable
Slot: PRIMARY
Skill: 2H Slashing Atk Delay: 45
DMG: 30 Dmg Bonus: 155
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
Effect: Rain of Swords (Combat, Casting Time: Instant) at Level 40
WT: 2.0 Size: MEDIUM
Class: WAR
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)

Item Type:2H Slashing
Stackable:No
Submitted By:The Council of Truth
Lucy Entry By:Vigilyn [Townebels]
Item Updated By:SwiftyMUSE
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2021-07-27 04:52:50
Page Updated:Tue May 2nd, 2017

Expansion: Original
Rarity: No Longer Dropped
Level to Attain: 50
[Adventure Merchants | Comments ]

This item is the result of a quest.
Expansion List - Premium only.
Quest Name
Where is Marcia Attamilgad?

Adventure Merchants


North Ro
Merchant Name Cost Faction TS Skill
Marcia Attamilgad [Rare Items] 90
Nobles

Zone(s) Found In:


Zone Name
North Ro
Plane of Fear
This item used to drop from Cazic Thule in the Plane of Fear.


Uploaded December 15th, 2022 by halfridge
Updated December 16th, 2022

90 Nobles
QuoteReply
# Oct 01 2014 at 4:07 PM Rating: Good
Drewinette
View User Forum
1,658 posts
As of today it can be bought from Marcia Attamilgad for 90 Nobles.
▲ Page top
Finally a good GM event
QuoteReply
# Sep 26 2003 at 7:10 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592259184582
17 posts
GM event on Druzzil on 9/25/03 was pretty badass. emote said a dragon was flapping his wings in Eastern Wastes, 70 people show up murder it, a small group of liek 14 who had raid set up got exp and stuff and got 4 green scales(not the war epic ones) and another emote came up that an npc in PoK wanted the remains of the dragon well 70 pissed off people showed up at the gm controled npc. first of the people who got the scale was awarded a Pre Nerf Guise of the Deciever. noone else came forward with the scale so gm asked for a warrior that took the damage to come forward and open trade with him. Since the warrior who had taken damage was kinda mad and logged i stepped forward since i tanked for a while and died. Awarded me this fine blade. Badass proc on it. Then he asked for a rogue to step forward and open trade. rogue was awarded a Mask of Tinkerers. I got the shaft of the lewt but i dont care its a fun as hell weapon. lala that is all


Btw proc crits for 430's, proc's often, and lands pretty well on PoP mobs.

Edited, Fri Sep 26 08:11:22 2003
▲ Page top
What do you think.
QuoteReply
# Jan 06 2003 at 5:41 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591785050734
1 post
I probably have one of the last existing ones at all. What do you guys think, could this still be powerful even with all the pop stuff out. I figured with critical procs and a few of the 2handed aa skills with max dex str and haste it would still be a powerhouse.

# Mar 06 2002 at 7:08 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592758553100
213 posts
This drops off of Cazic-Thule, the god of fear, who resides in the Plane Of Fear. You need to be level 46+ to even ENTER the plane, much less survive.
▲ Page top

▲ Page top
#Anonymous, Posted: May 22 2001 at 9:06 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) and also cazic thule cant be raided any more if your level 40 cause his level was upped to 65 so hes no longer just a normal camp u can ***** around with, i think at level 49-55 are good levels to go on raids to kill him, unless u get a ton of level 40 to take him out its jsut too hard
#Anonymous, Posted: Jun 08 2001 at 11:39 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) So Cazic can't be raided anymore if you're level 40, eh? Except for the slight fact you have to be level 46 to even enter a plane...

you will never get one of these

# Mar 04 2001 at 4:05 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591752271394
20 posts
Cazic thule is the main boss of the fear plane. He is god. You won't even have a hope of getting one of these untill late 40's and up even then you more then likely will roll with other warriors for it.

#Anonymous, Posted: Jun 17 2001 at 9:09 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) why do i even play this game????? "who is cazic?" What the hell, do people even TRY to get some story out of everquest????
